ops.title: Tailnet URLs program: surface trust legs, dynamic binding, embed integrity
ops.description: Approved plan at ~/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-06/plans/this-is-still-happening-indexed-shore.md. Workstreams: A synckit SelfDNSName (v0.21.0 — v0.20.0 already tagged+pushed), B cc-interact AddHTTPListener + honest static fallback (v0.12.0), C cc-present dynamic legs + tailnet: URLs in start/push (after A+B), D cc-present embed integrity (untrack dist/index.html, validateDist startup blow-up), E docs (contract.md + plugin skill refs). Release order synckit → cc-interact → cc-present. cc-present working copy is shared with the focus-UX session — path-scoped ships only. Ops unblock for yasyf-home documented in the plan (serve off, task build, trust URL).

ops.text: start prints tailnet: MagicDNS URL line(s) when trust legs are live; push prints url + tailnet after revision:
tailscale-down-at-start daemon publishes legs within ~35s of tailscale up, without restart
daemon built without web step refuses to start with 'run task build' error; asset/API misses 404 instead of serving the SPA shell
dist/index.html untracked; only .gitkeep committed under internal/web/dist
all three repos released and green: synckit v0.21.0, cc-interact v0.12.0, cc-present minor
